name: check_package
description: Look up the current status, location, and delivery details of a package by its ID. Use this tool whenever the operator mentions a package ID and wants to know where it is, what its status is, or when it will arrive. Do NOT guess status — always call this tool for package inquiries.

packageid.description: The exact package identifier provided by the operator (e.g. PKG12345678). Copy it verbatim — do not modify or infer it.

name: redirect_package
description: Change the destination of a package that is currently in transit. Use this tool only when the operator explicitly requests a redirect and provides: (1) a package ID, (2) a new destination, and (3) a security code. The tool returns a confirmation code — always pass it back to the operator verbatim.

packageid.description: The exact package identifier provided by the operator.

destination.description: The target destination code or address to redirect the package to, as provided by the operator.

code.description: The security/authorization code provided by the operator to authorize the redirect. Required by the API — do not omit or invent it.
